scan.footer: Scan the QR code in the desktop app to fill in the details below.

form.nameFooter: Shown in the clipboard top bar. If left blank, the server address is used instead.
form.urlFooter: You can add several addresses for the same server (LAN / Tailscale / public). The app automatically picks a reachable one for your current network; the first is the default.

connect.resultFooter: The address marked "Will use" is preferred on your current network; it is reselected automatically when the network changes.

probe.allUnreachable: None of the addresses are reachable. Check your network or server address.
probe.authFailed: Authentication failed. Check your username and password.
probe.unreachable: Unable to connect to the server.
probe.missingFields: Please fill in all connection details.

alert.fillAllFields: Please enter the server address, username, and password
alert.fillAllFieldsDot: Please enter the server address, username, and password.
alert.fillFieldsFirst: Please enter the server address, username, and password first
alert.fillUrlFirst: Please enter at least one server address first.
alert.fillCredentialsFirst: Please enter your username and password first.
alert.invalidUrl: The server address format is invalid
alert.invalidUrlDot: The server address format is invalid.
alert.cannotConnect: Unable to connect to the server
